generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a fellow woman who values stability and security, I've noticed how our allies often take advantage of our generosity. Did you know that only 3 out of 28 NATO members meet the 2% defense spending target? Meanwhile, our tax dollars keep flowing overseas while local communities struggle. We deserve partners who share the burden equally. #StrongAlliances #FairBurdenSharing
